name: Element Catcher
description: Capture visible UI inspiration and prepare it for reusable component generation.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts; default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; img-src 'none'; font-src 'none'; media-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
